phrases.text_local: Sabe de algum bom restaurante de comida típica por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bih DIH ahl-GOONNG BOHNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DIH koo-MEE-duh TEE-pee-kuh POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: O 'Quintal da Vila' serve comida regional autêntica e fica a dois minutos a pé.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW'keen-TAHL DUH VEE-luh' SEH-ruh-vih koo-MEE-duh reh-zheeoo-NAHL ow-TAYNG-tee-kuh EH FEE-kuh AH DOYSH mee-NOO-toosh AH PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Do you know any good local food restaurants around here? The 'Quintal da Vila' serves authentic regional food and is just a two-minute walk away.

responses.english: Do you know any good local food restaurants around here? The 'Quintal da Vila' serves authentic regional food and is just a two-minute walk away.
responses.phonetic: AW'keen-TAHL DUH VEE-luh' SEH-ruh-vih koo-MEE-duh reh-zheeoo-NAHL ow-TAYNG-tee-kuh EH FEE-kuh AH DOYSH mee-NOO-toosh AH PEH.
responses.local: O 'Quintal da Vila' serve comida regional autêntica e fica a dois minutos a pé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Igreja de Santa Maria is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de Santa Maria?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic parish church featuring notable 18th-century gilded woodwork.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado do Castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the Castle.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the Castle.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado do Castelo.

phrases.text_local: Pode me indicar um restaurante típico aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao lojista na Porta da Vila ou ao guia local na Igreja de Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the shop owner at the Porta da Vila or the local guide at the Igreja de Santa Maria.

responses.english: Ask the shop owner at the Porta da Vila or the local guide at the Igreja de Santa Maria.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao lojista na Porta da Vila ou ao guia local na Igreja de Santa Maria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Beco do Sol is
phrases.text_local: Onde é o Beco do Sol?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW BEH-koo DOO SAWL?
phrases.cultural_note: Beco do Sol is a known side alley, but exact location may vary.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Beco do Sol.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BEH-koo DOO SAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Beco do Sol.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Beco do Sol.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BEH-koo DOO SAWL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Beco do Sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the parking payment kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o pagamento do estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too DOO shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Outdoor machines accept coins and cards for town parking.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao fiscal de estacionamento. Ele indica o parquímetro.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too. EH-lih een-DEE-kuh AW puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the parking attendant. He points to the parking meter.

responses.english: Ask the parking attendant. He points to the parking meter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too. EH-lih een-DEE-kuh AW puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao fiscal de estacionamento. Ele indica o parquímetro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main gate is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Porta da Vila?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: This historic archway marks the traditional town entrance.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Porta da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the main gate.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the main gate.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Porta da Vila.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Beco do Sol alley is
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica o Beco do Sol?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW BEH-koo DOO SAWL?
phrases.cultural_note: The alley connects Rua Direita to the upper castle views.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um lojista ou ao guia local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Please, where is Beco do Sol? Ask a shop owner or the local guide.

responses.english: Please, where is Beco do Sol? Ask a shop owner or the local guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte a um lojista ou ao guia local.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um parquímetro por perto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roo POOR PEHR-too?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde compra bilhetes para o Castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih KOHMP-ruh bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AW kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket sales are handled directly at the castle wall entrance.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira do Castelo, siga as placas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the castle ticket booth, follow the signs.

responses.english: Good morning, at the castle ticket booth, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na bilheteira do Castelo, siga as placas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the church donation box is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de esmolas da igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH SHMOH-luhsh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Donations support ongoing preservation of the medieval structure.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão, ele pode ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN, EH-lih PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan, he can help.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan, he can help.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN, EH-lih PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão, ele pode ajudar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Igreja de Santa Maria is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The church is a key landmark along the main street.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Santa Maria. O sacristão pode ajudar com mais informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH. AW suhk-reesh-TOWN PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR KOHM MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Church of Santa Maria. The caretaker can help with more information.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Church of Santa Maria. The caretaker can help with more information.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH. AW suhk-reesh-TOWN PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR KOHM MEYESH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Santa Maria. O sacristão pode ajudar com mais informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a bilheteira do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: The castle ticket booth is generally at the entrance, but confirm at the counter.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main entrance.
